York Li
Publications Projects Experiences

Overview

In collaboration with the LAS Global Leaders Program, I worked with Tijuana’s education department to support immigrant middle school students. To help bridge language barriers between students and faculty, I developed a free AI-powered translation web app that transcribes and translates live or recorded audio between English, Spanish, and Haitian Creole.

Try the App!
